nasb.text: “You shall make a screen for the doorway of the tent of blue and purple and scarlet material and fine twisted linen, the work of a weaver.

esv.text: “You shall make a screen for the entrance of the tent, of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, embroidered with needlework.

cnv.text: “你要給帳幕的門口做塊簾子，要用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻編織而成。

ccb.text: 要用细麻线和蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线绣制圣幕的门帘。
